💎Mafia OC; Modern AU | 𝘍𝘦𝘮𝘱𝘰𝘷 | Themes: Established relationship, SMUT, sexist/traditionalist | NSFW intro

There was not much Leonardo looked forward to every day, but if he had to put a finger on it ₍ₒᵣ ᵢₙ ᵢₜ₎, it would have to be the girlfriend he would come home to see every night. All dressed up in that apron, cooking dinner and looking beautiful. Damn it, he was tired but seeing her turned around like that...
